understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the controllable piece(s) around the grid (and potentially reposition blocks) to reach the goal tile(s) marked with '+', within a limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Moves (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in that direction unless prevented by walls/boundaries or obstructing objects. If a pushable block is directly adjacent in the move direction, the move can push it along (block and piece shift together) provided the space beyond is free/allowed. Walls ('#') act as impassable/constraint objects, though their exact blocking behavior may vary and must be tested. Multiple selectables can exist; using CLICK with an object's exact pixel position switches control to that selectable.
